fields_extracted_written: fixture.date -> date/fixture_date; fixture.id -> fixture_id; fixture.timestamp -> fixture_timestamp in refresh; fixture.status.short/long/elapsed -> status/fixture_status_*; league.name/id/country/season -> league/league_id/country/season; teams.home/away.id/name -> team ids/names; goals.home/away and score.fulltime/halftime/extratime/penalty -> result columns
fields_fetched_ignored: fixture.referee; fixture.timezone; fixture.periods; fixture.venue.id/name/city; fixture.status.extra; league.logo/flag/round/standings; teams.home/away.logo/winner; most score fields before match; API paging/parameters metadata
placeholders_or_defaulted: home_xg_for/home_xg_against/away_xg_for/away_xg_against=0.0; home_sot_for/away_sot_for=0.0; home_big_for/away_big_for=0.0; home_motivation/away_motivation=0.0 or 5.0 in legacy fetch; home_absences/away_absences=0.0
downstream_flow: filter_leagues uses country/league/status; score_matches_v3 includes xG/SOT/big placeholders in data_quality old_data_count and absences/motivation in penalties/bonus; label_market_results uses status and goals/score for settlement
notes: Venue/referee are available in raw API and cache but not persisted in normalized matches.csv by the current today pipeline.

fields_extracted_written: fixture.status.short/date/timestamp for filtering; teams.home.id/away.id; goals.home/away -> computed home/away recent_matches, form_pts, goals_for_pg, goals_against_pg, scored_rate, clean_sheet_rate, btts_rate, over15_rate, over25_rate, stats_season_used, data_enrichment_level
fields_fetched_ignored: league details except cache key season choice; fixture venue/referee/periods; score halftime/fulltime detail; team logos/winner; fixture round; opponent/competition quality not explicitly modeled
placeholders_or_defaulted: If insufficient data metrics become NaN and data_enrichment_level marks NO_AVAILABLE or PARTIAL; no direct API team statistics endpoint used
downstream_flow: score_matches_v3 drives attack_environment_score, goal_path_scores, team_edge_score, data_quality_score; select_core_candidates requires recent sample; deep_analysis projects goals from these metrics
notes: Recent form is locally inferred from last fixtures, not sourced from a richer team/player/statistics endpoint.

fields_extracted_written: league.id/name/season; team.id/name; rank; points; goalsDiff; all.played/win/draw/lose; all.goals.for/against -> home/away rank, points, goals_diff, played, table_goals_for/table_goals_against, league_team_count, urgency_score
fields_fetched_ignored: home split played/win/draw/lose/goals; away split; form; description; group; status; update; team logo
placeholders_or_defaulted: Missing standings leave NaN; continental/world competitions have downstream score damping rather than coverage-aware feature flags
downstream_flow: score_matches_v3 uses rank/points/goals_diff/urgency/league_team_count for rank_strength, standings_edge, standings_context_score, team_edge; table_goals_for/against and played are written but mostly not scored
notes: Qualification/relegation descriptions are ignored even though they may better encode motivation than current coarse urgency.

fields_extracted_written: bookmakers count; unique bet ids count; values count; best/max odds for bet ids 1,5,8,12,206,207 outcomes; implied probabilities derived locally
fields_fetched_ignored: fixture/league/update in odds response; bookmaker id/name per price; all non-selected bet ids; bookmaker-specific dispersion/consensus; opening/closing movement if represented by repeated fetches; many lines such as Asian handicap, team goals, corners/cards, exact score
placeholders_or_defaulted: Unsupported/absent odds columns are NaN; NO_ODDS_FOUND writes zero counts and missing prices; double chance/DNB currently NaN in many rows despite response market count because ids may be absent or unsupported
downstream_flow: deep_analysis_candidates uses selected odds for primary/alt edge; final exports/governance use edge and odds; score_matches_v3 initial ranking mostly does not use odds prices
notes: This is the strongest premium layer currently used, but only as selected market prices, not market-implied feature engineering.

fields_extracted_written: fixture.id/date/timestamp; league.id/season; teams ids; goals.home/away -> first_leg_fixture_id, first_leg_home_goals, first_leg_away_goals, tie_home/away_agg_before, tie deltas, trailing flags, tie_state_label
fields_fetched_ignored: Venue/referee/status detail beyond date ordering; all non-first-leg h2h history; score halftime; team winner/logo; competition round
placeholders_or_defaulted: Non-two-leg matches get is_two_leg_tie=0 and NOT_TWO_LEG_TIE defaults; missing first leg gets status but no aggregate metrics
downstream_flow: tie_state_adjust_scores adjusts attack environment, team edge, market hint, priority; deep_analysis uses tie_state_label in projected goals and market choice
notes: Good niche use for knockout ties, but not a broad H2H predictive layer.

fields_extracted_written: none in production; only checked for access in check_api_plan.py
fields_fetched_ignored: team statistics list including shots, shots on goal, possession, passes, fouls, corners/cards, attacks/dangerous attacks where available
placeholders_or_defaulted: home_sot_for/away_sot_for, xg placeholders, big-chance placeholders remain 0.0 and are not backed by statistics
downstream_flow: score_matches_v3 old_data_count can count zero-filled old_core columns as non-null, creating data-quality inflation risk
notes: High-value paid data is available enough to test but not integrated.

fields_extracted_written: none in production; only checked for access in check_api_plan.py
fields_fetched_ignored: formation, startXI, substitutes, coach, player ids/names/numbers/positions/grid
placeholders_or_defaulted: home_absences/away_absences remain 0.0; no lineup strength, formation, rotation, or starter continuity columns
downstream_flow: absences_noise_penalty currently sees zero placeholders, so missing lineup/injury data can make matches look cleaner than they are
notes: Pre-match usability depends on lineup timing; valuable near kickoff but not always available early.

fields_fetched_ignored: all injury records because endpoint is not called
placeholders_or_defaulted: home_absences/away_absences are zero placeholders, not injury counts or severity-weighted losses
downstream_flow: score_matches_v3 absences_noise_penalty is effectively disabled unless manually filled
notes: One of the clearest underused premium data layers for pre-match quality.

fields_fetched_ignored: all prediction/comparison/advice payload because endpoint is not called
placeholders_or_defaulted: no columns for API predicted winner, percentages, goals advice, comparison attack/defense/form
downstream_flow: No downstream use; vSIGMA is not calibrated against API-Sports prediction prior
notes: Useful as an external benchmark/ensemble feature, but must avoid blindly copying vendor output.
